events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail** — clearance to wall/adjacent unit is below the manufacturer's minimum, violating IMC/IRC M1401's requirement to install per manufacturer instructions. This risks restricted condenser airflow, elevated head pressure, and reduced service life/efficiency. Since the unit is only rough-complete, corrective action (relocate unit or remove obstruction to meet mfr clearance) should happen now before close-out.
